display_text: Naga Siren Aghanim's Scepter: Enhances Ensnare to target and affect Debuff Immune units and applies Break. This upgrade counters Debuff Immunity mechanics like Black King Bar, allowing Naga Siren to disable key enemy heroes during crucial moments and neutralize passives.
search_text: Naga Siren Aghanim Scepter Ensnare Break Debuff Immune Black King Bar counter-disable

display_text: Naga Siren Aghanim's Shard: Improves Song of the Siren with increased regeneration and added mana regeneration for allies. This upgrade transforms Naga Siren into a team sustain powerhouse, enabling prolonged engagements and recovery during or after teamfights.
search_text: Naga Siren Aghanim Shard Song of the Siren regeneration mana sustain teamfight
